name: Very Best Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine milk, eggs, seasonings (including chopped onion), and onion in a food processor.
2. Blend all ingredients well until smooth.
3. Spread the mixture evenly over 6 slices of soft bread.
4. Add ground beef and pork sausage on top of the bread.
5. This will make 2 large meatloaves.
6. Bake for one hour at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Consider freezing one meatloaf for later use.
8. Many people enjoy this meatloaf, which has been a family favorite for over 20 years according to Doris Kennedy.
